name: Provision Plasmic Site

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { type: 'A', name: $('Assess State').first().json.dnsName, content: '157.90.224.29', ttl: 1, proxied: true } }}

={{ { project_uuid: 's8kkk004gckck8k040kkkk8o', environment_name: 'git arena', server_uuid: 'vs080ogook8wkoo4ogggsk8k', destination_uuid: 'psow8cggos8oow00ks0048wc', git_repository: 'https://github.com/AiheApp/plasmic-nextjs-template', git_branch: 'master', name: $('Assess State').first().json.appName, ports_exposes: '3000', build_pack: 'dockerfile', instant_deploy: false } }}

={{ { data: [ { key: 'PLASMIC_PROJECT_ID', value: $('Create Plasmic Project').first().json.projectId, is_preview: false }, { key: 'PLASMIC_PROJECT_TOKEN', value: $('Create Plasmic Project').first().json.projectToken, is_preview: false }, { key: 'PLASMIC_HOST', value: 'https://studio.aihe.dev', is_preview: false }, { key: 'REVALIDATE_SECRET', value: $('Assess State').first().json.revalidateSecret, is_preview: false } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, url: $('Resolve Context').first().json.url, appUuid: $('Resolve Context').first().json.appUuid, projectId: $('Resolve Context').first().json.projectId, deploymentUuid: $('Extract Deployment').first().json.deploymentUuid, reused: $('Resolve Context').first().json.reused } }}

={{ { ok: false, stage: $('Prepare Rollback').first().json.stage, cause: $('Prepare Rollback').first().json.cause, rolledBack: { app: !!$('Prepare Rollback').first().json.appUuid, dns: !!$('Prepare Rollback').first().json.dnsId, project: !!$('Prepare Rollback').first().json.projectId } } }}

parameters.command: =set -eu; S=$(grep -m1 '^ADD_PAGE_SECRET=' /opt/plasmic-page-api/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('Assess State').first().json.siteName }).base64Encode() }}' | base64 -d | curl -sS -m 55 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/create-project -H "Authorization: Bearer $S" -H 'content-type: application/json' --data-binary @- -w '\n%{http_code}'

=set -eu; S=$(grep -m1 '^ADD_PAGE_SECRET=' /opt/plasmic-page-api/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ projectId: $('Create Plasmic Project').first().json.projectId, pageName: 'Home', path: '/', text: $('Assess State').first().json.text }).base64Encode() }}' | base64 -d | curl -sS -m 55 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/add-page -H "Authorization: Bearer $S" -H 'content-type: application/json' --data-binary @- -w '\n%{http_code}'

=set -eu; S=$(grep -m1 '^ADD_PAGE_SECRET=' /opt/plasmic-page-api/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ projectId: $('Create Plasmic Project').first().json.projectId, description: 'provision-to-live pipeline' }).base64Encode() }}' | base64 -d | curl -sS -m 175 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/publish-project -H "Authorization: Bearer $S" -H 'content-type: application/json' --data-binary @- -w '\n%{http_code}'

=set -eu; S=$(grep -m1 '^ADD_PAGE_SECRET=' /opt/plasmic-page-api/.env | cut -d= -f2-); echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ projectId: $('Prepare Rollback').first().json.projectId }).base64Encode() }}' | base64 -d | curl -sS -m 25 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/delete-project -H "Authorization: Bearer $S" -H 'content-type: application/json' --data-binary @- -w '\n%{http_code}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { type: 'A', name: $('Assess State').first().json.dnsName, content: '157.90.224.29', ttl: 1, proxied: true } }}

={{ { project_uuid: 's8kkk004gckck8k040kkkk8o', environment_name: 'git arena', server_uuid: 'vs080ogook8wkoo4ogggsk8k', destination_uuid: 'psow8cggos8oow00ks0048wc', git_repository: 'https://github.com/AiheApp/plasmic-nextjs-template', git_branch: 'master', name: $('Assess State').first().json.appName, ports_exposes: '3000', build_pack: 'dockerfile', instant_deploy: false } }}

description: Provisions a Plasmic Next.js site on aihe.dev or aihe.me (optional domain param, defaults to aihe.dev). Creates CF DNS A record, Coolify app, sets FQDN + env vars, deploys.
